economic_notes: Jean Marie River Development Corporation Ltd. (100% owned, property rental and construction). Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.27% owned, helicopter charter operations). Development Corporation had capital deficiency of $608,703.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Province coded as NT (Northwest Territories). Accounts receivable includes both trade accounts receivable ($415,688) and contributions receivable ($4,897,258). Current liabilities include accounts payable ($371,274) and contributions repayable ($51,472); deferred contributions ($9,256,504) treated separately as deferred revenue. No long-term debt identified. No schedule of remuneration provided. Prior year figures restated. Earnings from subsidiaries of $18,420 included in annual surplus. Deh Cho Helicopters LP uses May 31 year-end so figures are one year lagged. Expenses by program estimated from departmental lines in income statement.
